<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:山本八幡宮 (富士宮市)]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:山本八幡宮 (富士宮市)]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:山本八幡宮 (富士宮市)]]

{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
|name= Yamamoto Hachiman Shrine
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
|image= File:Yamamoto Hachiman Shrine.jpg
|location= {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|WD=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}, {{ill|Fujinomiya, Shizuoka|en|Fujinomiya, Shizuoka|WD=Q496072|lt=Fujinomiya|1=Fujinomiya, Shizuoka}}, Yamamoto aza Yato 1
|coordinates= {{Coord|35.2077444|N|138.6292|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}
|deity= Emperor Ōjin<br />{{ill|Minamoto no Mitsunaka|en|Minamoto no Mitsunaka|WD=Q2531241|lt=Minamoto no Mitsunaka|1=Minamoto no Mitsunaka}} (traditionally)
|type= Former Village Shrine
|Established=
|festival= September 9
|prefecture= {{ill|Fujinomiya|WD=Q496072|1=Fujinomiya, Shizuoka}}
}}

'''Yamamoto Hachiman Shrine''' (山本八幡宮, Yamamoto Hachimangū) is a [[shrine]] located in {{ill|Fujinomiya, Shizuoka|en|Fujinomiya, Shizuoka|WD=Q496072|lt=Fujinomiya|1=Fujinomiya, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|WD=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}. It is also referred to as '''Tōdō Hachiman Shrine''' (多田八幡宮). Under the [[Modern shrine Ranking system]], it was classified as a Village Shrine.

== Origins ==
According to tradition, the shrine was established when Yoshino Sadatomi, the great-grandfather of {{ill|Yamamoto_Kansuke_(general)|en|Yamamoto_Kansuke_(general)|WD=Q468447|lt=Yamamoto Kansuke|1=Yamamoto Kansuke (general)}}, enshrined the deity.

== References ==
{{Reflist}}

== External Links ==
* [http://www.city.fujinomiya.shizuoka.jp/kankou/kansuke/kansuke.htm Fujinomiya City]
== See Also ==
* {{ill|Yamamoto_Kansuke_(general)|en|Yamamoto_Kansuke_(general)|WD=Q468447|lt=Yamamoto Kansuke|1=Yamamoto Kansuke (general)}}

{{Shinto Horizontal}}
{{shinto-stub}}


{{translated page|ja|山本八幡宮 (富士宮市)|version=81579773|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[ja:山本八幡宮 (富士宮市)]]
[[ja:%E5%B1%B1%E6%9C%AC%E5%85%AB%E5%B9%A1%E5%AE%AE (%E5%AF%8C%E5%A3%AB%E5%AE%AE%E5%B8%82)]]

[[ja:山本八幡宮]]

[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
